title: Project Detection
description: Schema for the JSON shape produced by the onboarder persona during the detect step of the onboard-project meta-pipeline. Captures the project's flavour, build system, test command, and any signals that informed the detection.

flavour.description: Detected project flavour. Use 'unknown' when no signal is conclusive — downstream steps will degrade gracefully.

build_system.description: Build system associated with the flavour (e.g. go, cargo, npm, bun, pip, dotnet). Null when not determinable.

test_command.description: Canonical test command for the project (e.g. 'go test ./...'). Null when not determinable.

package_managers.description: Package managers in use, ordered by precedence.

signals.description: Concrete files or markers that informed the detection (e.g. 'go.mod', 'package.json', 'Cargo.toml'). Each entry is a path relative to the project root.

additional_signals.description: Free-form key/value pairs for unusual or composite signals not covered by the canonical fields. Use this rather than guessing at the canonical shape.

project_intent.description: Optional human-readable summary of what the project does, derived from README / design docs.
